stories.title: Paramedic Science course “paused” at Wrexham University amid job shortages
stories.summary: Wrexham University’s Paramedic Science programme will not take on new students for the 2026-27 academic year, after Health Education and Improvement Wales (HEIW) paused commissioning of the course across Wales. The decision – taken in agreement with Welsh Government and the Welsh Ambulance Services University NHS Trust (WAST) – also affects the equivalent course at

stories.title: Shotton residents say waste dump is blocking emergency vehicle access to Health Street
stories.summary: Residents say an unlicensed waste dump is blocking emergency access to a narrow street in Shotton. An access road that leads to the rear of properties on Health Street in Shotton has been fenced off and rubble and waste dumped inside it. People living on the narrow residential street just off Rowleys Drive have challenged

stories.title: Saltney High Street salon burglary: man charged with seven offences
stories.summary: A 41-year-old Birkenhead man has been remanded in custody after being charged in connection with a burglary at a salon on Saltney High Street. David Christopher McCouid, of Sidney Street, Birkenhead, appeared before Mold Magistrates Court on 23 April. He faces two counts of burglary, three counts of vehicle interference, one count of fraud and

stories.title: Live on the Square returns to Mold for eighth year on 3 May
stories.summary: Tickets for the eighth annual Live on the Square music festival in Mold are selling fast, organisers say, with the event returning to Daniel Owen Square on Sunday 3 May 2026. The event runs from 12.30pm to 9.30pm. It is ticket-only, with no admission without a ticket. Tickets cost £12, with no concessions and no

stories.title: Chester Zoo keeps UK’s best zoo crown for third year running
stories.summary: Chester Zoo has been named the best-rated zoo in the UK for the third year running, according to new 2026 rankings from Tripadvisor. The Cheshire attraction, just across the border from Deeside, has recorded 11,666 ‘excellent’ visitor reviews on the travel platform. That is up from 11,392 in 2025.
